title: critoniopsis unguiculata
intro: Critoniopsis unguiculata, also known as Mexican daisy, is a flowering plant species within the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Critoniopsis unguiculata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve antioxidant status, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial activities, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Critoniopsis unguiculata can be obtained through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, and are often used to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
